name: OneAZ Credit Union
description_short: OneAZ Credit Union is a federally-chartered credit union offering checking, savings, loans, and wealth management services with branches across Arizona including a Glendale location near ASU West.
description_long:
OneAZ Credit Union operates as a full-service credit union serving Arizona members with a network of physical branches and digital banking options. The organization provides comprehensive financial services including deposit accounts, lending products, and wealth management, with a specific branch location in Glendale near ASU West campus designed to serve students and local members.

The credit union offers a range of deposit products including high-yield savings accounts (Propel Savings at 4.00% APY up to $10,000), share certificates (currently 2.85% APY for 24-month terms), and standard checking/savings accounts. For borrowing needs, they provide auto loans (5.19% APR for used vehicles at 48 months), home equity loans with rate discounts, and broader loan origination services. Members also access wealth management services, mobile banking with check deposit and bill pay functionality, and ATM networks including Coinstar services.

The Glendale-ASU West branch distinguishes itself through convenient campus-adjacent location, extended Friday hours (until 6 PM), drive-thru service, and appointment scheduling capability. The credit union has launched federal worker assistance programs in response to government shutdowns, indicating member-focused responsive services. Recent customer reviews highlight efficient service delivery and staff attentiveness.

However, as a credit union rather than a traditional bank, OneAZ likely requires membership eligibility (though specific membership requirements are not detailed on this branch page). The website does not disclose current rates for all products, limiting rate transparency. The branch location is specifically identified as serving ASU West, suggesting geographic membership boundaries may apply.

As a financial institution, this bank competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find flexible terms through online lenders, while debt consolidation loans offer fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments over 12 to 60 months.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

tiers.name: Checking Account
features: No monthly maintenance fee (with qualifying deposit)

pros: High-yield savings account (Propel Savings) at 4.00% APY up to $10,000
Competitive used auto loan rates at 5.19% APR for 48-month terms
Share certificates with promotional 2.85% APY for 24-month terms
Home equity loans with 0.50% rate discount off posted rates
Mobile banking app with check deposit, fund transfers, and bill pay
Drive-thru service and ATM/Coinstar access at branch locations
Extended Friday hours (9 AM - 6 PM) for working members
Federal worker assistance program for members impacted by shutdowns
Wealth management services available at branch
cons: Membership eligibility requirements not clearly disclosed on branch website
Limited rate transparency—only current rates for select products shown
Single branch location page does not detail full product menu or membership criteria
No information on fees, minimum balances, or account requirements
Federal tax deduction eligibility for car loans requires meeting unspecified IRS requirements
best_for: ASU West students and staff seeking convenient on-campus banking
Arizona credit union members seeking competitive savings and auto loan rates
Federal employees seeking emergency assistance during government shutdowns
Consumers looking for full-service banking with mobile app and branch services
diagnosis: OneAZ Credit Union is best for Arizona residents eligible for credit union membership seeking full-service banking with competitive savings rates and auto loan products. The main caveat is that specific membership eligibility requirements and complete fee structures are not disclosed on the branch website, requiring prospective members to contact the credit union directly for membership details.
services: Mobile banking app with check deposit
Bill payment and fund transfer services
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: OneAZ Credit Union is a federally-chartered credit union offering checking, savings, loans, and wealth management across Arizona.
